videos.title: Earth’s Upper Atmosphere Is Cooling Rapidly - And Scientists Don’t Know Why
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: What if one of the strongest signs of global warming is actually part of Earth's atmosphere getting colder? videos.title: Giant Asteroid Will Fly Closer Than Satellites - And We'll See It
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: On April 13th, 2029, something extraordinary will happen in the skies above Earth. videos.description: Scientists have discovered a surprising new ocean phenomenon in which parts of the sea suddenly experience underwater "blackouts," with sunlight disappearing for days, weeks, or even months at a time. videos.title: James Webb Found Planet We Could Live On - Then Things Got Weird
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description:
The James Webb Space Telescope has discovered an intriguing Earth-like planet located relatively close to our cosmic neighborhood.
